creator: mfv@bway.net
text:
Hello,

Have not been able to build libreoffice as patch does not cleanly apply as show below:

> cd /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice
> sudo make clean
> sudo make

===>  License LGPL3 MPL accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for libreoffice-4.3.6
===>   libreoffice-4.3.6 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by libreoffice-4.3.6 for building
===>  Extracting for libreoffice-4.3.6
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libreoffice/libreoffice-4.3.6.2.tar.xz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libreoffice/libreoffice-help-4.3.6.2.tar.xz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libreoffice/1f24ab1d39f4a51faf22244c94a6203f-xmls
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libreoffice/4b87018f7fff1d054939d19920b751a0-coll
===>  Patching for libreoffice-4.3.6
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/files/enable-open
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/files/extra-Makef
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/files/disable-cpp
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/files/extra-libc+
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/files/extra-libc+
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for libreoffice-4.3.6
No such line 360 in input file, ignoring
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to Makefile.in.rej
=> Patch patch-Makefile.in failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice
Exit 1

I hope that after building libreoffce I can use lpd/lp for printing rather than cups.

Cheers, with thanks ...

Marek
